hero.lead: Zero-code auto-instrumentation for Java applications. Hundreds of supported libraries and frameworks; configurable via system properties or env vars.

pipeline.title: Instrumentation categories
pipeline.lead: Java auto-instrumentations are grouped by category. Click any category to filter the instrumentation list.

config-builder.title: Configuration builder
config-builder.description: Build a declarative agent configuration interactively.

releases.title: Compare releases
releases.description: See what's new between two Java Agent versions.

supported-libs.title: Supported libraries
supported-libs.description: Browse the complete catalog of supported libraries and frameworks.

page.title: OpenTelemetry Java Agent
page.description: Explore auto-instrumentation for Java applications. Discover supported libraries, configuration options, and emitted telemetry.

instrumentation.title: Instrumentation Libraries
instrumentation.description: Explore auto-instrumentation for Java applications. Discover supported libraries, configuration options, and emitted telemetry.

configuration.title: Configuration Options
configuration.description: Discover options for configuring the Java Agent and instrumentation.

builder.title: Configuration Builder
builder.description: Build and customize a declarative configuration file for the Java Agent.

releases.title: Releases
releases.description: Compare Java Agent versions to see changes in telemetry and configuration.

list.title: OpenTelemetry Java Agent
list.invalidVersion: Version "{{version}}" was not found. Showing the latest version ({{latest}}) instead.

results.empty: No instrumentations found matching your filters.
results.emptySuggestion: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria

customSection.title: Custom Instrumentations
customSection.description: Non-library instrumentations such as methods, JMX metrics, and external annotations.

tooltips.targetVersions: The versions of the target library that this instrumentation supports.
tooltips.scope: An instrumentation scope is metadata indicating the identity of what produced a piece of telemetry.

standaloneLibrary.error: Library documentation is not available for this version.

releaseComparison.title: Release Comparison
releaseComparison.description: Compare Java Agent releases to discover new features and changes in telemetry.

placeholder.title: Under Development
placeholder.description: The Java Agent Release Comparison tool is currently being built. Check back soon to compare telemetry changes across versions.

releaseComparison.invalidComparisonDescOne: One or both of the selected versions do not exist in the registry.
releaseComparison.invalidComparisonDescTwo: Comparisons are usually performed from an older version to a newer version.
releaseComparison.selectDifferent: Select two different versions to see changes.
releaseComparison.noChanges: No changes found in telemetry or configuration.
releaseComparison.noChangesDesc: Everything is identical between these two versions.

configList.title: Configuration Options Explorer
configList.description: Explore all configuration options across instrumentations. Search by normal name, declarative representation, or description.

results.empty: No configurations found matching your search.

agent.label: Agent
agent.tooltip: Standard instrumentation that runs alongside the application using a Java agent.

library.label: Library
library.tooltip: Standalone libraries are installed manually and for use without the agent.

spans.label: Spans
spans.tooltip: Produces span telemetry for distributed tracing.

configTabs.loadError: Configuration data could not be loaded. Please try again later.

telemetrySection.empty: No metrics or spans defined for this configuration.

error.title: Comparison Error
error.bothVersionsFailed: Both versions could not be loaded. The instrumentation may not exist in these versions.

availability.title: Version Availability Note
availability.fromNotFound: The instrumentation was not available in version {{fromVersion}}. All telemetry from the "to" version is shown as added.
availability.toNotFound: The instrumentation was not available in version {{toVersion}}. All telemetry from the "from" version is shown as removed.

sameVersion.title: Same Version Selected
sameVersion.message: Please select different versions to compare telemetry.

empty.title: No differences found
empty.description: Telemetry is identical for {{condition}} between the selected versions.

diffCard.metricRemoved: This metric is no longer emitted in the comparison version.
diffCard.spanRemoved: This span is no longer emitted in the comparison version.
diffCard.spanAdded: This span is newly emitted in the comparison version.
diffCard.moduleAddedTooltip: This module was added in the new version
diffCard.moduleRemovedTooltip: This module was removed in the new version
diffCard.moduleChangedTooltip: This module has telemetry or configuration changes

builder.title: Configuration Builder
builder.description: Build and customize your OpenTelemetry Java Agent configuration.

general.label: General
general.empty: The schema for this version does not expose general instrumentation settings.

preview.title: Output Preview
preview.dialogDescription: Complete generated YAML configuration for your OpenTelemetry Java Agent.

empty.search: No instrumentations match "{{search}}". Clear the search to show all {{total}}.
empty.customized: You haven't customized any instrumentation yet. Click "+ Customize" on a row to add one.

row.statusDescription: Explicitly enable or disable this instrumentation.

form.empty: No configurable options for this module.

keyValueMap.duplicateKeyError: Duplicate key: only the last value for each key is kept.

pluginSelect.customEmpty: Custom plugin. Configure its body manually by importing YAML or leave it as an empty block.

builder.circularRef: Circular reference to {{type}}. Configure this under its canonical section.

HTTP_ROUTE.label: HTTP Route
HTTP_ROUTE.description: Enriches HTTP spans with route information.

CONTEXT_PROPAGATION.label: Context Propagation
CONTEXT_PROPAGATION.description: Propagates context inter-process (via headers in HTTP, gRPC, and messaging) and inter-thread (executors, actors, and reactive streams).

AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_SHIM.label: Auto Instrumentation Shim
AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_SHIM.description: Adapts or bridges instrumentation from upstream libraries or frameworks.

CONTROLLER_SPANS.label: Controller Spans
CONTROLLER_SPANS.description: Generates spans for controller/handler methods in web frameworks. Disabled by default and experimental.

VIEW_SPANS.label: View Spans
VIEW_SPANS.description: Generates spans for view rendering such as templates or JSP. Disabled by default and experimental.

LOGGING_BRIDGE.label: Logging Bridge
LOGGING_BRIDGE.description: Bridges logging framework events to the OpenTelemetry Logs API, emitting log records from standard logging frameworks.

RESOURCE_DETECTOR.label: Resource Detector
RESOURCE_DETECTOR.description: Sets resource attributes based on certain conditions.
